title: Countersex
director: Renato Castellani, Marco Ferreri, Franco Rossi
writer: Cesare Zavattini, Leonardo Benvenuti, Piero De Bernardi
actors: Nino Manfredi, Anna Maria Ferrero, Ugo Tognazzi
plot: A vivid assortment consisted of three acts taken from the lives of modern 1960s Italians, always in orbit around the restless theme of sexual inhibition and the pursuit of pleasure in sex.
